# H_012 owner-loop-rct — Fable 5 design (seed of record · distil FROM here, do not edit to track)

Prompt: fable_owner_rct.md (grounding-randomization RCT · $0 sampler-twin precheck · consent-gated live build)

## Fable verdict (verbatim JSON)

```json
{
  "runnable_without_deception": "YES — but not via options (a) or the naive wrong-utterance design. The clean intervention is (c), sharpened: GROUNDING RANDOMIZATION. Per eligible turn, a pre-logged coin assigns the arm: LIVE = the agent replies from its true accumulated session state; GHOST = the same model, same system prompt, same immediate owner message, but the session-history grounding is replaced by a topic-matched snapshot drawn from the owner's OWN past sessions. Every emitted utterance is a genuine best-effort reply honestly produced by the emitting process — nothing false is ever asserted — so there is no deception of the owner; the randomized variable is the agent's internal state, do(grounding), not truth/falsity. Crucially this reproduces the certified LV-C structure exactly: GHOST is Watson's yoked control at the real-loop level — action MARGINAL matched (same style, same topic, genuine reply), CONTINGENCY to this session broken. Consent is blanket-and-blinded ('some replies will be answered from an alternative memory configuration; you won't know which'), like a consented retrieval UX experiment. Knowing the experiment is running does NOT break identification — randomization stays exogenous — it only shifts the estimand to 'the consented loop', which must be pre-registered as the estimand. Option (a) (marginal-matched wrong utterances with consent) is identifiable but injects false content into real work and is rejected; option (b) (timing/ordering) is non-deceptive but tests a causally-thin dimension that cannot carry the contingency claim and would yield uninterpretable nulls. If the owner detects a GHOST reply ('that misses what we discussed'), that is not a failure of blinding — differential owner response IS the closure signal.",
  "dollar0_precheck": "TWO concrete pre-checks on the existing 16.7k H_010 pairs, both $0. (1) SAMPLER-TWIN precheck (primary): decode stochasticity is a genuine local randomizer of U_t given context. Find context-matched pair strata via the existing LOO k-NN on context embeddings (reuse the H_010 cache), where the agent — facing near-identical context — sampled materially different utterances; test whether the direction of the utterance difference predicts the direction of the owner-reply difference above the certified shift-null floor. This is semi-interventional: valid under conditional ignorability given the matched context, honestly weaker than full identification (unobserved context — files on disk, owner's mental state — can leak), but strictly stronger than H_010's topic-matched-wrong-utterance contrast because both compared utterances were genuinely emitted. (2) MODEL-VERSION regression discontinuity (secondary instrument): model releases/switches shift utterance style exogenously to conversational content; compare owner-reply coupling in narrow time windows around version boundaries. Weakness: exclusion restriction threatened by calendar-time project-phase trends — restrict to ±1-week windows and treat as corroboration only. Interruptions and /clear boundaries are REJECTED as instruments (owner-caused, endogenous). Verdict on precheck validity: (1) is valid as a semi-interventional screen — it can REFUSE cheaply or upgrade prior odds, it cannot ANCHOR.",
  "harness_spec": "H_012B harness. RANDOMIZES: per eligible turn, coin C_t ∈ {LIVE, GHOST} at p=0.5, committed to an append-only local log BEFORE generation. Eligibility (pre-registered classifier): conversational/planning turns only — no pending file edits, no destructive ops, no time-critical fixes; ≤1 trial per session; consent recorded once at enrollment; owner kill-switch honored immediately with trials-to-date retained. Optional low-rate third arm SELF-GHOST (true state, re-sampled seed) to price pure sampling noise. LOGS (privacy hard rule, enforced in the harness not by policy): repo receives ONLY {trial_id, timestamp, arm, turn_index} plus derived scalars from the owner's next reply — embedding k-NN rank statistics against the pooled reply bank, latency, length, and a locally-computed continuation-vs-correction binary. No content, no excerpts, ever; raw text never leaves ~/.claude. ESTIMATOR: the certified H_011 stack unchanged — LOO k-NN discriminability of arm from owner-next-input embedding, shift-null permutation floor with labels permuted within session strata, LV-C closure statistic = discriminability minus the yoked-marginal floor. POWER: proxy closure was 0.76; assume real-loop attenuation to AUC ≈ 0.65 vs 0.5 null → Hanley-McNeil gives ~120–140 trials/arm at α=0.05, power 0.8 → ~250–300 total trials ≈ 2–3 months at natural usage. Pre-register O'Brien-Fleming group-sequential boundaries (looks at 120 / 200 / 300 trials) so a proxy-sized effect stops early.",
  "anchor_gate_and_falsifiers": "GATE (pre-registered, one-sided): ANCHOR iff the LV-C closure statistic (LIVE-vs-GHOST discriminability from the owner's subsequent input alone) exceeds the within-session shift-null 95th percentile under the sequential correction, with positive sign (the agent's session-contingency fingerprints the owner's next input). What distinguishes this from H_010's REFUSE: the arm is randomized, so P(owner_input | do(grounding)) is identified — a pass here is CAUSAL closed-loop coupling on the real loop, which H_010 could never license; conversely a null here at full power is a genuine interventional REFUSE of reframe C on the target loop, also terminal. FALSIFIERS: F1 quality-channel (LV-W analogue): blind-judge the agent utterance alone for quality; if closure vanishes after conditioning on quality score — or if SELF-GHOST is as discriminable as GHOST — the signal is degradation/noise, verdict CHANNEL-ONLY, not closure. F2 null instrument: the full pipeline run on permuted arm labels must sit at floor; any 'closure' there invalidates the instrument. F3 yoked/consent artifact: closure must survive excluding turns where the owner explicitly meta-comments on the experiment; if the whole effect lives in audit turns it measures being-audited, not the relationship. F4 side-channel leakage: if arm is decodable at equal AUC from agent-utterance surface features (latency, length) alone, require closure to survive conditioning on them, else REFUSE-LEAKY.",
```
